overall.description: Gameplay footage from a racing simulator showing a first-person perspective drive in an Audi on rainy highways at night. The driver overtakes trucks, passes through toll plazas, and crosses bridges while wipers actively clear the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural multi-lane highway with tree lines

events.description: overtaking a large white semi-truck on the right side
merging back into the left lane after completing the overtake

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on a rainy night, actively overtaking a slow-moving truck with wipers clearing the windshield

notable_agents.action: large white semi-truck being overtaken on the right side
oncoming traffic with headlights visible in the distance

entered.detail: metal highway guardrail running along the left side of the road
metal highway guardrail running along the right side of the road
dense trees lining the highway in the background
white lane markings visible on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: Driving on a rural highway at night during heavy rain, overtaking a large white semi-truck. Guardrails line both sides of the road with trees visible in the background, and the windshield wipers actively clear rain from the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll plaza approach with overhead gantries and blue signage

events.description: approaching toll plaza with overhead blue signs and red warning lights
entering the covered toll area with bright overhead lighting illuminating the scene

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while approaching and passing through the toll plaza area

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead passing through the toll gate

entered.detail: large overhead toll gantry structure spanning the highway
blue informational signs mounted on the overhead gantry
toll booth infrastructure with lighting and barriers
bright artificial lights mounted on the toll structure

segments.scene_description: Approaching and entering a toll plaza area with overhead gantries and blue highway signs. The scene transitions from open rural highway to a semi-covered toll area with bright artificial lighting, while the right guardrail and background trees disappear from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway bridge with metal railings and industrial barriers

events.description: exiting the toll area onto an elevated bridge section with metal railings
overtaking a green sedan on the right side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed across the bridge section while navigating past other vehicles

notable_agents.action: green sedan being overtaken on the right
large truck visible in the left lane behind the ego vehicle

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the left side of the bridge
metal safety railing along the right side of the bridge
concrete or metal barriers separating the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: Driving across an elevated bridge or industrial highway section with metal railings on both sides. The toll structures exit the view as the bridge railings enter, with the area lit by streetlights and barriers separating the lanes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane highway with speed management gantries

events.description: passing under overhead speed limit gantry displaying 100
approaching and passing another overhead speed limit sign

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the open highway, passing under speed limit gantries while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: white car ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: overhead gantry displaying speed limit signs showing 100
tall streetlights illuminating the highway ahead
urban lighting visible on the horizon in the distance
metal highway guardrail reappearing on the right side

segments.scene_description: Continuing on an open highway section with overhead speed limit gantries displaying '100'. The bridge railings exit the view as standard guardrails return, with streetlights illuminating the wet road and distant city lights visible on the left horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a car travels from a dark, rain-swept rural highway into the artificial brightness of a toll plaza. It begins with the vehicle speeding through heavy rain, the windshield wipers actively clearing the view as the car overtakes a large white semi-truck flanked by guardrails and distant trees. As the road progresses, the open rural landscape begins to tighten, and the natural darkness of the night shifts toward the glow of highway infrastructure. The scene then transitions into a toll plaza area, where the camera passes under overhead gantries and blue highway signs. Finally, the environment opens into a semi-covered zone illuminated by bright artificial lighting, causing the surrounding trees and right-side guardrails to disappear from view.

The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a confined industrial bridge into an open stretch of rain-slicked highway. It begins by crossing an elevated section characterized by metal railings and streetlights, as the toll structures fade from view. As the camera moves forward, the bridge railings give way to standard guardrails, opening the perspective to a wider road. The scene then shifts toward an open highway section where overhead gantries display a speed limit of 100, while the lighting expands to reveal distant city lights shimmering on the left horizon.
